case_title: MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION VS. EDISON BARLOW et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, EDISON DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING HEARING DATE ON DEFTS ANIT SLAPP SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION
